name: claudia
description: Slim, skill-driven Claude Code framework for Python and Nextflow development. One command (`/claudia`) dispatches to skills via explicit verbs (understand, plan, execute, close, rules, pr-review, write-issue, add-type-hints, prepare-docstrings) or natural-language routing. Workflow skills are gated and control-first; bioinformatics reviewers (nextflow-reviewer, domain-reviewer) dispatch in parallel inside close. A tiny shared script (detect/config/env/rules) provides the deterministic skeleton; per-task state is a single plan file.
